files_modified.purpose: Package marker for prompts resource vault
Governance seed for CLAUDE.md with DeviaTDD Orchestration Rules
Governance seed for AGENTS.md with DeviaTDD Orchestration Rules

commit_subject: feat(T002): add prompt seed resources for constitution and governance
commit_body: Create static prompt resource files under src/deviate/prompts/ for downstream init command consumption: constitution_seed.md with tokenized ${PROJECT_NAME}/${REPO_ROOT} placeholders and all required constitution sections, plus governance seeds (claudemd_seed.md, agents_seed.md) both containing the ## DeviaTDD Orchestration Rules header for idempotent governance file management.

validation.summary: Package importable via importlib.resources, both governance seeds contain ## DeviaTDD Orchestration Rules header, ruff lint clean

reasoning.approach: Created all 5 files in a single pass as static content artifacts with no runtime logic

key_decisions.rationale: Required by spec for regex-based project file scanning resolution in T003

key_decisions.decision: Governance seeds have identical structure but separate files
key_decisions.rationale: Task spec requires distinct files (claudemd_seed.md vs agents_seed.md) even though content is currently identical; separates concerns for potential future divergence
